final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of tangible assets Earnings before amortisation

variables.notes: Selected XSGA components intentionally excluded depreciation/amortization. The statement shows explicit D&A lines as separate operating items before financial income, so they are not treated as embedded in the selected XSGA component rows. Use the tangible-assets depreciation summary row rather than its components, and include the separate amortisation row.
